title: Déjà vu
html: Stub. First dated mention in 2019 09 23 deja vu eugene springfield — Yahir gets a déjà vu hit driving back from Eugene through Springfield while opening a Snapchat photo. A perception-glitch he treats as worth timestamping. Cluster with heightened perception trigger and the later dream-log entries.

related.label: Deja vu coming back from Eugene through Springfield
Dream: outer left ear felt stiff, and hurt upon inspection
Time-capsule recording — Jan 2 2020 'recording with my life'
